decisions.rationale: Sonnet executor agent ran but failed to commit or complete changes despite reporting success. Plugin.pm partial changes are in working tree.

next_action: Commit Plugin.pm _trackItem cache changes, then continue Task 1: extend cache in ProtocolHandler.pm (_cacheExplodedTrack, _cacheExplodedEpisode, _asyncRefetch) and Connect.pm (_fetchTrackMetadata). Then Task 2: rewrite trackInfoMenu and trackInfoURL.
context_notes: Phase 33 resolves GitHub Issue #29. The plan is well-specified with exact line numbers and interface details in 33-01-PLAN.md. A Sonnet executor agent was spawned but failed silently — it modified Plugin.pm _trackItem but never committed. Recommend inline execution for remaining work.
